ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* RL algorithm used (e.g., PPO, DQN) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment or simulation used (e.g., CartPole, Atari) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or department of the researcher */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., actor_loss, critic_loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of hyperparameter (e.g., learning_rate, discount_factor) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, question, suggestion) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the annotation */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., actor, critic, reward) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "num_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed during the session */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps during the session */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward obtained during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the testing session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the testing session */,
  "num_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed during the session */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps during the session */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward obtained during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode metric record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode */,
  "episode_reward" REAL /* Reward obtained in the episode */,
  "episode_length" INTEGER /* Length of the episode (number of steps) */,
  "episode_success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the episode was successful */,
  "reward_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of rewards obtained during the episode */,
  "action_values" TEXT /* Values of the actions taken during the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment configuration */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the configuration file */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., gym, custom) */,
  "config_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to configure the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_configs_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES experiments ("environment")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., final, interim) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
